name: Expo
philosophy: A React Native developer-platform whose marketing site reads like a quietly-confident infrastructure brand.
trademark_signals: Pure white canvas with sky-blue gradient atmospheric backdrop in hero only
Single primary CTA: pure black pill at (8px) — compact developer-tool dialect
Text-link blue for inline links only — never on a CTA
Inter as the single sans family — no custom display typeface
JetBrains Mono on every code surface
ai_slop_avoided: Don't introduce a saturated brand action color. Black is the only CTA fill
Don't use blue on a CTA. Inline links only
Don't drop display below weight 600 or above 700
